sections.paragraph:
[“to knead with hands and feet, kindred to דֹּושׁ, also דָּבַשׁ, דָּרַשׁ”], to knead dough, Gen 18:6 1Sa 28:24 2Sa 13:8. (Syriac and Chald., Eth. ለዊስ፡ id.). Hence לוּשׁ.

[“(2) to be strong, firm; Arab. لَاثَ Med. Ye, III., V., id. Hence לַיִשׁ.”]

לוש

pr.n. m. 2Sa 3:15 כתיב; compare לַיִשׁ 2, b.
